welcome.title:
Better habits,
Better you.
welcome.subtitle: Track your health, build healthy habits and reach your goals step by step.

install.title: Install GluciAI
install.androidBody: Add the app to your home screen for faster access.
install.iosBody: Add GluciAI to your home screen to open it like a real app.
install.iosStep1: Tap ⋯ (or the Share icon), at the bottom of your screen

onboarding.slide1Desc: Take a photo and instantly get carbs, sugar and calories.
onboarding.slide2Desc: Log values in seconds and see your trends clearly.
onboarding.slide3Desc: Understand your doses with informational AI estimates.
onboarding.slide4Desc: Ask anything about diabetes, food and lifestyle.
onboarding.slide5Desc: Share clear PDF reports with your doctor.

chat.suggestion1: Why did my glucose spike this morning?

chat.chip4Q: I have a general question about diabetes.
chat.greetingNamed: Hi {{name}} 👋! I’m your health assistant. How can I help you today?

call.greeting: Hi! I’m your GluciAI assistant. How can I help you?

profile.title: My profile
profile.name: Name
profile.deleteConfirmBody: All your data (glucose, meals, profile) will be erased. This action cannot be undone.
profile.disclaimerRowSub: The AI can be wrong — GluciAI never replaces your doctor
profile.tagline: Take care of your health every day.
profile.aiSub: Ask me anything or analyze your data.
profile.subEmergency: People to contact in an emergency

consent.stepSub: Last step — read and accept each condition to create your account.
consent.footer: You can review these conditions and withdraw your consent at any time from your profile.
consent.dataDesc: I agree that my health data (glucose, meals, insulin, activity) is stored securely.
consent.dataDetailIntro: GluciAI stores your data to give you complete diabetes tracking. Here is exactly what is stored and how it is protected.
consent.dataS1B: Your glucose readings, insulin injections, scanned meals (photos and nutrition values), physical activity and your medical profile: diabetes type, ratios, target range, emergency contact.
consent.dataS2B: Your data is stored encrypted on secure servers. It is never sold or shared with third parties for advertising purposes.
consent.dataS3B: You can view, edit or delete your data at any time from your profile. Deleting your account permanently erases all your data.
consent.dataNote: Without this consent the app cannot work: diabetes tracking requires storing your readings.
consent.aiDesc: I allow the AI assistant to read my data to personalize its answers in the chat and voice call.
consent.aiDetailIntro: The GluciAI assistant (chat and voice call) uses your data to give you truly personalized answers instead of generic advice.
consent.aiS1B: Your medical profile (diabetes type, ratios, target range), your glucose readings, scanned meals, insulin injections, activity and your last-7-days statistics.
consent.aiS2B: To answer questions like "what did I eat today?" or "what do you think of my glucose?" precisely, the AI needs to see your real data while you talk to it.
consent.aiS3B: Your data is transmitted securely to the AI only while you are using it. It is never used to train artificial-intelligence models.
consent.aiNote: You can use the app without ever talking to the AI — but if you use it, this access is required for it to be useful.
consent.limitsDesc: I understand the AI gives suggestions, can be wrong, and never replaces medical advice.
consent.limitsDetailIntro: The GluciAI assistant is a help and education tool. It has important limitations you must know before using it.
consent.limitsS1B: Everything the AI tells you — food advice, analyses of your readings, insulin education — are educational suggestions. They are never medical prescriptions to follow 100%.
consent.limitsS2B: Like any artificial intelligence, it can make errors, misread a situation, or give imprecise information. Always double-check important information before acting.
consent.limitsS3B: Never change your treatment (insulin doses, medication) without your doctor or care team. Only they know your full medical history.
consent.limitsNote: In case of severe symptoms (severe hypoglycemia, fainting), do not use the app: call emergency services immediately.
consent.termsDesc: I accept the GluciAI terms of use and privacy policy.
consent.termsDetailIntro: By creating an account you accept the GluciAI usage rules. Here is the essential part.
consent.termsS1B: The app is intended for personal diabetes-tracking assistance. It is not a certified medical device and does not replace a consultation.
consent.termsS2B: You are responsible for keeping your credentials confidential. The information you enter must be accurate for your tracking to be meaningful.
consent.termsS3B: GluciAI evolves regularly: features may be added, changed or removed. Any important update to the terms will be announced in the app.
consent.termsNote: Declining these terms prevents account creation.

locked.title: Feature locked
locked.message: This feature is not included in your account at the moment.
locked.subscribeNote: Subscription required — contact support on WhatsApp to activate it.
locked.quotaMessage: You've used up your whole limit for {{period}}.
locked.quotaNote: It refills {{reset}} — or contact support to raise it.
locked.waMessage: Hello, I would like to activate "{{feature}}" in the GluciAI app. Thank you.
locked.waQuotaMessage: Hello, I've reached my limit for "{{feature}}" in GluciAI and would like to raise it. Thank you.
locked.planMessage: You're using GluciAI on the free plan. To unlock every feature (scanner, AI chat, voice call…), contact support.
locked.planNote: Upgrade to the full version — contact support on WhatsApp.

usage.title: My usage
usage.subtitle: Track how much of each AI feature you've used and what's left for the period.
usage.unlimitedNote: No limit — use it as much as you like.
usage.empty: No active limits on your account.
usage.supportMessage: Hello, I would like to raise my usage limits in GluciAI. Thank you.

glucosePage.title: Blood glucose
glucosePage.subtitle: Here's an overview of your glucose today.
glucosePage.subtitleDay: Here's an overview of your glucose on that day.
glucosePage.emptyMsg: Add your first glucose reading to start tracking.
glucosePage.predDisclaimer: Statistical estimate from your history — not a real reading nor medical advice.

bolus.title: Insulin dose
bolus.analyzing: The AI is analysing your case…
bolus.analyzingSub: Meal, glucose, active insulin, recent sport and trend — everything is considered.
bolus.hypoTitle: Low glucose — treat the hypo first
bolus.hypoBody: Your glucose is under {{low}} mg/dL. Take 15 g of fast sugar, wait 15 minutes and re-check. No bolus now.
bolus.aiUnavailable: The AI report is momentarily unavailable — the dose above is still computed with your medical parameters.
bolus.disclaimer: This is an AI estimate, not a final decision. The AI can make mistakes — your doctor remains the best reference. Always confirm the dose with them before injecting.
bolus.editDelta: Differs from the recommendation ({{rec}} U) — the AI will verify before saving.
bolus.alertDoctor: Talk to your doctor BEFORE taking this modified dose.
bolus.checkDangerFallback: This dose strongly deviates from the recommendation computed with your parameters and could be dangerous in your current situation.
bolus.checkCautionFallback: This dose deviates from the computed recommendation. Double-check before continuing.
bolus.noteModified: AI bolus {{rec}} U → changed to {{dose}} U by the patient

day.emptyMsg: No data recorded for this day.

timeline.title: Day report
timeline.entrySub: Everything you did, minute by minute
timeline.aiNote: The AI reads this full report (today + yesterday) before proposing an insulin dose.

logger.title: Logging assistant
logger.entrySub: "I took my insulin", "I ate a tajine"… the robot adds it for you.
logger.intro: Tell me what you just did — insulin, meal, glucose, sport, weight — and I'll add it to your account. I'll always ask you to confirm first. 😊
logger.placeholder: E.g.: I took 6 units of insulin…
logger.added: Noted! ✅ Added to your account — visible in the history and the day report.
logger.error: Oops, that didn't work. Please try again.
logger.recording: I'm listening… tap the mic to send 🎙️
logger.micDenied: I can't access the microphone. Allow it in the browser, or type instead.
logger.reminderSet: Noted! ⏰ I'll remind you at the scheduled time — and check afterwards that it's done.
logger.followUpAsk: ⏰ You had a reminder: "{{msg}}". Did you do it? Tell me and I'll log it.
logger.chipReminder: Remind me in 1h to take my insulin
logger.chipNote: I drank a glass of water
logger.deleted: Done 🗑️ The entry was removed from your account.
logger.deleteNotFound: I couldn't find that entry in today's data. Tell me more precisely what to delete.

coupon.title: Doctor code
coupon.heroSub: Enter the code your doctor gave you so they can follow up with you.

coupon.consentBody: By applying this code, you agree that your doctor may view your health data (meals, glucose, insulin, daily report) to better support you. You can remove this at any time.
coupon.privacyNote: Your doctor can only view this data to support you. You stay in control.

hf.title: Healthy food
hf.subtitle: Meals that fit your diabetes
hf.empty: No dish found. Try another word.
hf.igDescLow: Low GI: the carbs digest slowly, so blood sugar rises gently — ideal for a diabetic.
hf.igDescMedium: Medium GI: moderate effect on blood sugar. Pair with vegetables or protein to slow absorption.
hf.igDescHigh: High GI: blood sugar can rise quickly. Keep the portion small and eat vegetables and protein first.
hf.askAi: Ask the AI about this dish
hf.disclaimer: Estimated values for education. Adjust portions with your doctor or dietitian.
hf.worldHint: Type any food or product name (yogurt, dates, chocolate, bread…) — real photos, per-100 g values and a diabetes indicator.
hf.worldEmpty: No product found. Try another name.
hf.worldDown: The world database is temporarily unavailable. Try again in a moment.
hf.per100gNote: Values per 100 g · green dot = diabetes-friendly
hf.worldSource: Source: Open Food Facts (global collaborative database)

wr.title: World dishes
wr.subtitle: Pick a country and a moment
wr.preparing: Reading the recipe and computing values…
wr.askAi: Ask the AI about this dish
wr.disclaimer: Recipe and values are indicative. Adjust portions with your doctor or dietitian.
wr.aiBannerTitle: Let the AI pick for you
wr.aiBannerSub: It knows your glucose, insulin and preferences
wr.aiSub: It knows all your health data
wr.aiGreeting: Hi! I can suggest dishes that fit your diabetes. Tell me what you feel like — and importantly: any allergies or foods you dislike?

insulinPage.title: Insulin
insulinPage.emptyMessage: Add a dose with the + button, or let the bolus calculator suggest one.

foodsPage.title: Moroccan cuisine
foodsPage.subtitle: Estimated carbs per serving — add a dish without a photo 🇲🇦
foodsPage.highGiWarning: High glycemic index — check your glucose 2 h after eating.

integrations.title: Sensors & health
integrations.subtitle: Connect your sensors and health platforms — your readings flow into GluciAI automatically.
integrations.note: Native connections (HealthKit, Health Connect, LibreLinkUp, Dexcom Share) activate in the app published on the App Store and Google Play — the architecture is already in place.
integrations.appleHealthDesc: Syncs glucose, activity and weight with your iPhone's Health app.
integrations.googleFitDesc: Syncs your health data on Android via Health Connect.
integrations.libreDesc: Automatically imports readings from your Libre sensor (LibreLinkUp).
integrations.dexcomDesc: Receives continuous readings from your Dexcom CGM (Share).

rappelsPage.title: Smart reminders
rappelsPage.subtitle: GluciAI learns your routine (readings, injections, meals) and reminds you at the right moment — not at arbitrary times.
rappelsPage.webNote: 📱 Notifications activate on iPhone and Android — on the web, this preview shows what will be scheduled.
rappelsPage.footNote: The times readjust automatically as you keep logging.

nutritionPage.title: Nutrition
nutritionPage.ratioMissing: Set your ratio in the medical profile
nutritionPage.sugarWarn: ⚠️ {{sugar}} g of sugar today — watch your post-meal glucose.
nutritionPage.recDisclaimer: Personalized educational tips — they don't replace your dietitian.
nutritionPage.emptyMessage: Scan your meal to estimate carbs, sugar and calories — then your bolus.
nutritionPage.bolusLink: Calculate the bolus for this meal →

menuScanPage.title: Restaurant menu
menuScanPage.introSub: The AI reads every dish on the menu, computes its nutrition and shows you the best choice for your glucose.
menuScanPage.reading: Reading the menu and computing nutrition…
menuScanPage.resultCount: {{count}} dishes analyzed — ranked from best to worst for your diabetes
menuScanPage.unreadable: We couldn't read this menu. Take a sharper photo of the card.
menuScanPage.analysisError: Error while analyzing the menu. Please try again.
menuScanPage.orderedSave: I ordered this dish — save it

emergencyPage.title: Emergency
emergencyPage.hypoStep1: Give 15 g of fast sugar (3 sugar cubes, ½ glass of juice).
emergencyPage.hypoStep2: Wait 15 minutes, then re-check the glucose.
emergencyPage.hypoStep3: If the person is unconscious: give NOTHING by mouth, call {{num}}.
emergencyPage.hypoStep4: Place the person in the recovery position.
emergencyPage.addDoctorPhone: Add their number in the profile
emergencyPage.idHint: If I feel unwell: give me sugar if I'm conscious, otherwise call {{num}}.
emergencyPage.homeHint: Tap to open my address in Google Maps.
emergencyPage.homeAdd: Add your address in the profile

barcodePage.sugarWarning: {{sugar}} g of sugar — watch your glucose.
barcodePage.verdictOkay: ⚠️ Acceptable in small amounts — watch your glucose.

scanResultPage.giHint: This food can raise your glucose quickly — consider checking 2 h after the meal.
scanResultPage.bolusDisclaimer: AI educational estimate only — this is NOT medical advice. Always confirm the dose with your doctor.

recs.bmiHigh: Your BMI is {{bmi}} — losing 5% of body weight clearly improves insulin sensitivity. Favor vegetable tagines and grilled fish.
recs.bmiLow: BMI {{bmi}} — consider protein-rich snacks (a little sellou, almonds) between meals.
recs.favorite: You love "{{name}}" ({{count}}× this week). Add a salad (zaalouk, Moroccan salad) first: fiber slows the glucose spike.
recs.sugarWeek: {{sugar}} g of sugar this week. Mint tea with little or no sugar would make a real difference.
recs.fiber: Your meals lack fiber. Good low-GI Moroccan picks: {{foods}}.
recs.glucoseHigh: Current glucose is high ({{value}}) — for the next meal aim for < 40 g of carbs: grilled kefta, fish, vegetables.
recs.walk: 10–15 min of walking after the main meal cuts the glucose spike by 20–30%.
recs.gestational: Gestational diabetes: split into 3 meals + 2 snacks and avoid fruit juice, even fresh.
recs.fallback: Keep scanning your meals — the more you log, the more precise the recommendations get.

mealScore.giHigh: High glycemic index ({{gi}}) — fast glucose rise
mealScore.fiberRich: Rich in fiber ({{g}} g) — slows sugar absorption
mealScore.fiberPoor: Low in fiber for its carb load

activityStatus.title: Activity status
activityStatus.intro: Set your status to Active, Sick, Injured or Paused. GluciAI will adjust its insulin recommendations to your condition.
